results.rendered_html:
jarjarita a. [jarj-ṇic karmaṇi kta]
1 Old, decayed, infirm.
2 Worn out, torn to pieces, shattered, splintered &c.
3 Completely overpowered, disabled; smaraśarajarjaritāpi sā prabhāte  Gīt. 8.
